title: Take routine site measurements
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Take routine site measurements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for measurements

pcs.text: Confirm the purpose, priority and nature of measurements from work documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the purpose, priority and nature of measurements from work documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the purpose, priority and nature of measurements from work documentation.

pcs.text: Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange location access and all necessary clearances or permits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange location access and all necessary clearances or permits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with relevant personnel to arrange location access and all necessary clearances or permits.

pcs.text: Identify location hazards and review workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location hazards and review workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location hazards and review workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble measuring and safety equipment and check they are fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble measuring and safety equipment and check they are fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble measuring and safety equipment and check they are fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Check all items against inventory and stow them to ensure safe transport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check all items against inventory and stow them to ensure safe transport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check all items against inventory and stow them to ensure safe transport.

pcs.text: Arrange any required transport for location access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange any required transport for location access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange any required transport for location access.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for measurements

elements.title: Take measurements

pcs.text: Locate and access measurement points in accordance with security and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and access measurement points in accordance with security and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and access measurement points in accordance with security and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Seek advice if the required measurements cannot be made or if procedures require modification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice if the required measurements cannot be made or if procedures require modification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice if the required measurements cannot be made or if procedures require modification.

pcs.text: Operate measuring equipment in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate measuring equipment in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate measuring equipment in accordance with workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Take sufficient readings to ensure reliable data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take sufficient readings to ensure reliable data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take sufficient readings to ensure reliable data.

pcs.text: Record data with required legibility, accuracy, precision and units
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record data with required legibility, accuracy, precision and units?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record data with required legibility, accuracy, precision and units.

pcs.text: Record environmental conditions and any other observations that may impact on data quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record environmental conditions and any other observations that may impact on data quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record environmental conditions and any other observations that may impact on data quality.

pcs.text: Recognise obvious errors and atypical data and take appropriate corrective action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise obvious errors and atypical data and take appropriate corrective action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise obvious errors and atypical data and take appropriate corrective action.

pcs.text: Follow procedures for location security when sampling is completed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow procedures for location security when sampling is completed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures for location security when sampling is completed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Take measurements

elements.title: Finalise measurement  process

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures for any required cleaning and decontamination of equipment and vehicle

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check all equipment and materials against inventory and stow for safe transport.

pcs.text: Liaise with relevant personnel to restore normal production and/or services as necessary

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with relevant personnel to restore normal production and/or services as necessary.

pcs.text: Report all measurements in accordance with workplace procedures

pcs.text: Check and document serviceability of equipment before storage

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and document serviceability of equipment before storage.
